notes.managed: Always refreshed by `agent-os install` and `agent-os update` (includes agent-logs/README.md — do not hand-edit it in a project).
notes.adapters: Overwritten on update only with --force-adapters (preserves thin-pointer pattern).
notes.projectOwned: Never overwritten by update unless --force. STATUS.md is never overwritten, even with --force. Sealed logs are never touched.
